title: Multi-Chain Activity Discovery
description: Scan every supported chain simultaneously to discover which networks a wallet has been active on — single call, 200+ chains. The must-have entry point for any cross-chain app.
useCase: Detect all chains a user has ever been active on before loading their portfolio — use this as the first call in any multi-chain app to skip querying inactive chains.

keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to discover chain activity for
